experience.summary:
• Manage end-to-end delivery of regional marketing automation solutions and CRM initiatives on HCL Unica, Adobe Campaign with backend databases (Oracle, SQL) integration.
• Own full project lifecycle—from requirements gathering and solution design to testing, deployment, post-launch evaluation by keeping tab of project scope, timelines, resources and budgets.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including marketing, analytics, product, and compliance to gather business requirements, design solutions, and translate them into clear user stories, process flows, data mappings, acceptance criteria, and test plans within complex banking ecosystems.
• Design and execute multi-channel campaigns (email, SMS, push notifications), build campaign workflows for segmentation, lead nurturing, A/B testing, and personalisation—resulting in measurable improvements in and conversions across regional markets.
• Own product backlog along with it's prioritisation and facilitate Agile ceremonies effectively driving cross-functional teams of 8–12 team members and significantly boosting velocity and quality for continuous improvement.

•	Lead end-to-end project management lifecycle for marketing and CRM initiatives, including planning, coordination, execution, and delivery across internal departments.
•	Collaborate with stakeholders, IT, and business users to gather and analyse requirements, ensuring alignment of marketing technology solutions with business goals.
•	Drive implementation of marketing automation and data platforms (e.g., Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data Management Platform, Cross-Channel Optimisation) to enhance digital marketing capabilities.
•	Identify and implement new enabling technologies for knowledge based marketing and consumer business.
•	Champion the integration and automation of CRM campaigns with online portals, mobile apps, and backend systems to enable seamless customer experiences.
•	Manage and execute multi-channel CRM campaigns (Email, SMS), including audience segmentation, data extraction, and performance tracking through campaign management tools.
•	Continuously monitor campaign effectiveness, delivering actionable insights and optimisation strategies to improve customer engagement, deliverability, and ROI.

•	Act as a key liaison between business stakeholders and technical teams to gather, clarify, and translate requirements, ensuring alignment and eliminating ambiguities.
•	Design and configure IBM Unica Campaign batch flowcharts to meet complex business requirements, enabling targeted customer engagement across banking products.
•	Collaborate closely with QA teams to manage Pre-Production testing with zero defects to ensure smooth on time production rollouts.
•	Write efficient and optimised SQL queries and database calls to extract targeted customer data for analysis purpose.

•	Serve as the primary Unica Administrator and Solution Consultant, supporting installation, upgrades, and optimisation of the Unica Campaign Suite for a leading telecom client.
•	Deliver end-to-end onsite support for Unica infrastructure, including system implementation, troubleshooting, and enhancement of operational efficiency.
•	Develop, test, and deploy marketing campaigns as part of Application Maintenance and Support (AMS), ensuring high availability and performance.
•	Provide ongoing issue resolution and technical support for campaign-related challenges, collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive timely solutions.
•	Conduct Unica user training sessions, enabling marketing teams to effectively use campaign tools and adhere to it's best practices.

•	 Play a key role in enabling contextual marketing through data-driven segmentation and event-triggered interactions, enhancing customer experience and retention.
•	Streamline campaign operations by improving process efficiency, optimising trigger logic, and ensuring timely execution of dynamic customer communications.
•	Partner with campaign managers to analyse existing architecture and deliver scalable solutions for implementing event-based marketing via Unica Detect.
•	Design, develop, and deploy personalised marketing campaigns using IBM Unica, aligning with customer lifecycle stages and strategic business objectives.
•	Conduct end-to-end quality checks on campaign flowcharts and output data, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and error-free execution prior to rollout.

•	Collaborate with product, analytics, and compliance teams to align campaign strategies with financial regulations and customer engagement goals.
•	Analyse campaign requirements and translate them into scalable IBM Unica flowcharts, ensuring data-driven targeting and optimal audience segmentation based on business objectives across retail and international banking segments.
•	Design and execute targeted marketing campaigns, perform end-to-end quality assurance of campaign logic, flow structures, and output datasets to ensure delivery accuracy, regulatory compliance, and minimal operational risk.
•	Monitor campaign performance and share its insights and recommendations to stakeholders for continuous optimization and ROI enhancement.

candidate.headLine: Project & Campaign Manager | Marketing Automation | MarTech | Unica | Adobe | CSM | PMP
candidate.summary:
With over 17 years of banking & telecoms domain experience I specialise in delivering data-driven, multichannel marketing campaigns for major financial/telecom organisations like DBS Bank, Singtel, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank. A strong bridge between business strategy and technical delivery, I’ve designed and implemented data-led customer engagement projects using HCL Unica Campaign, Adobe Campaign, Oracle Responsys, with backend databases like Oracle, SQL, and Teradata.

Experienced in managing large- scale full life- cycle implementation of CRM Solutions, including ownership, and management of project financials.

Provide technical leadership and expertise in the marketing automation space across the organisation.

Strong capability in gathering business requirements, documenting processes, analysing needs, and engaging with stakeholders, with a focus on continuous improvement.

Core Skills: HCL UNICA | Adobe Campaign Standard | Oracle Responsys | Oracle | SQL | Campaign Automation | Customer Segmentation | Multi-channel Marketing | Business Analysis | Data Analysis | Marketing Analytics  | Project Management | Marketing Automation | Marketing Operations | Stakeholder Management

•	Campaign development as part of BAU team.
•	Studying the client requirement and suggesting technical specifications.
•	Manage Campaign related issues and facilitate solutions.
•	Build, executes and delivers accurate audience data for assigned campaigns using Unica.
•	Configure Offers and Response Tracking.
